name: Fairy Flame — 30-Day Microdose VSL

segments.vo_text: This is what would happen if you microdosed for 30 days.
segments.notes: Open on bed scene. Let VO breathe before cut.

segments.vo_text: About 5 days in, you're driving and a song comes on and you actually feel it. Not just hear it. Feel it.
segments.notes: Cut on driving beat / wheel tap.

segments.vo_text: You're at dinner and you catch yourself laughing — really laughing — for the first time in months. Nobody else notices yet. But you do. Something turned back on.
By week two, your wife says you seem lighter. Your buddy at work asks what happened. Nothing happened. You just woke up and didn't have to force yourself through the morning.
The fog you didn't even know was there starts to lift. You're not running on coffee and willpower anymore. You're actually present.
segments.notes: Match fog-lifting visual to 'fog lifts' line.

segments.vo_text: After 30 days, it hits you. You haven't felt like this in years. The flat, gray, going-through-the-motions version of you — that wasn't you. That was your brain running on fumes.
Your daughter looks at you and says, Dad, you're being fun again. And that one sentence makes everything worth it.
Fairy Flame microdose gummies. Precisely dosed. Lab tested. No tripping. Just one gummy on your dose days. Go to fairyflame.com. This might be how you start feeling like yourself again.
segments.notes: Product shot. Hold CTA on screen 2s after VO ends.

edit_rules: Trim each video clip to match VO duration — video can extend slightly past VO end for breathing room
No hard cuts — prefer 0.3–0.5s cross-dissolves between emotional beats
Keep music under VO at all times
No on-screen text unless product packaging is visible in shot 8
